idea-plugin.name: Ion Language
idea-plugin.description:
Syntax highlighting and LSP support for the Ion scripting language in JetBrains IDEs.

Features
  • Recognizes .ion files
  • Syntax highlighting via the upstream TextMate grammar (shared with the VSCode extension)
  • Optional LSP integration through LSP4IJ driving an external ion-lsp binary
  • Configurable in Settings | Languages & Frameworks | Ion
Install ion-lsp with cargo install --path ion-lsp to enable diagnostics, completion, hover, and go-to-definition.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.7.6

  • Adds native syntax highlighting for the JetBrains Ion file type and logs the resolved ion-lsp command when LSP4IJ starts the server.

0.7.5

  • Registers a native JetBrains Ion file type for .ion files and maps that file type to LSP4IJ, so the language server attaches reliably in RustRover.

0.7.4

  • Normalizes custom Windows + WSL commands such as wsl.exe -d Ubuntu --cd /project ion-lsp through a shell that includes $HOME/.cargo/bin on PATH, so the language server starts and hover documentation is available.

0.7.3

  • Updates the bundled LSP4IJ dependency baseline so TextMate-backed .ion files receive LSP hover documentation in current JetBrains IDEs.

0.7.2

  • Improves Windows + WSL language-server launch handling so hover, completion, diagnostics, and go-to-definition work when ion-lsp is installed inside the distro.
  • Starts the WSL language server through a shell with $HOME/.cargo/bin on PATH, matching the default cargo install location.

0.4.0

  • Highlights and LSP support for the new log:: module — log::trace, debug, info, warn, error, plus set_level / level / enabled. Hover overview describes the compile-time stripping cap.

0.3.2

  • Pairs with ion-lsp 0.3.2: hover now resolves methods (xs.push), module members (math::sqrt), type names, function parameters, and shows the full let initializer with mutability and type annotation.
  • Hover responses include the token range so editors highlight the hovered identifier.

0.3.1

  • Distinct scope (storage.type.string.ion) for the f-string f prefix so themes can color it apart from the string body.
  • Explicit punctuation.definition.string.{begin,end} captures on string delimiters.

0.2.1

  • Restored the TextMate file type mapping for .ion files in the bundled JetBrains grammar.

0.2.0

  • Updated syntax highlighting for current Ion language features: async runtime syntax, nested module paths, loop labels, cell type annotations, named arguments, and standard module APIs.

0.1.0

  • Initial release: file recognition, TextMate-based highlighting, optional LSP via LSP4IJ.

server.name: Ion Language Server
server.description: Spawns the external ion-lsp binary configured under Settings | Languages & Frameworks | Ion.
